name: grit-the-power-of-passion-and-perseverance
description:
Angela Duckworth's Grit — an executable toolkit for developing the power of passion and perseverance: how talent alone isn't enough, effort counts twice, and grit can be grown from the inside out.

Covers 5 use cases:
① Understanding Grit — the science of passion and perseverance
② The Effort Equation — Talent × Effort = Skill, Skill × Effort = Achievement
③ Developing Passion — discover and deepen interests over time
④ Deliberate Practice — practice that actually improves skill
⑤ Cultivating Hope & Resilience — the mindset that keeps you going.

Trigger when users say: "Grit" "Angela Duckworth" "Passion and perseverance" "How to be more persistent" "I give up too easily" "How to develop grit" "Talent vs hard work" "Deliberate practice" "Growth mindset" "How to stay motivated" "Never give up" "Resilience" "How to achieve long-term goals"
or mention: Angela Duckworth / Grit / passion / perseverance / effort counts twice / deliberate practice / purpose / hope.

Also triggers when the user says they just installed this skill or doesn't know how to start — the AI MUST proactively present the Quick Start guide below.

Related skills: atomic-habits, the-slight-edge, cant-hurt-me, make-it-stick, the-happiness-advantage.
useCase: Helps anyone develop the passion and perseverance to achieve long-term goals — backed by decades of research on what really drives high achievement.
knownRisks: Grit research has been criticized for overemphasizing individual effort over systemic barriers; this skill presents the research findings without dismissing structural factors.
